name: Diabetic Smunchies
recipeInstructions:
1. Break one graham cracker in half and spread a layer of sugar-free chocolate pudding on it.
2. Place thinly sliced banana on top of the pudding.
3. Top with the second half of the graham cracker.
4. Wrap tightly and place in the freezer.
5. When thawed, the treat will be gooey.
1. Break each long Graham cracker in half before using.
2. This recipe is a starch exchange.
3. The recipe was provided by a dietician at Riverside Hospital in Newport News, Virginia.
